title: The Idols NFT - Rekt
relevance_summary: Self-referential transactions creating infinite rewards in the reward system

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls _beforeTokenTransfer() with sender and receiver being the same address and sender's balance exactly 1

red_flags: sender and receiver being the same address
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls _beforeTokenTransfer() with sender and receiver being the same address and sender's balance exactly 1
summary: An attacker exploited The Idols NFT protocol by making self-referential transactions, causing the reward system to create infinite rewards. The Idols team detected the exploit quickly but lost approximately 97 stETH ($324k). A guard could have prevented this by blocking such transactions.
